summary: Iteration 517: Layer 3 Negative/Failure Suite - 23/25 backend tests passed, 4/4 frontend tests passed. FOUND 2 SECURITY ISSUES: XSS payloads in draft title and story_text are stored without sanitization. All other security (NoSQL injection, invalid tokens, malformed JWT, protected endpoints), abuse (duplicate drafts, credits manipulation, user isolation), edge cases (empty body, null values, special chars, invalid params, malformed JSON), and idempotency tests passed.

critical.issue: SEC-NEG-1: XSS payload '<script>alert(1)</script>' in title is stored without sanitization - raw script tags returned on retrieval
SEC-NEG-2: XSS payload '' in story_text is stored without sanitization - onerror handler returned on retrieval

issues: Page has minimal content (less than 50 chars body text) - may be intentional empty state
CSP warning for Cloudflare beacon script - non-blocking

action_items: CRITICAL: Add XSS sanitization to /api/drafts/save endpoint - sanitize title and story_text fields before storage using bleach or html.escape
Review security.py sanitize_input() function and ensure it's applied to draft save operations
Consider adding Content-Security-Policy headers to prevent XSS execution even if stored
critical_code_review_comments: drafts.py line 40-53: DraftSave model accepts raw strings without sanitization - title and story_text should be sanitized using security.sanitize_input() before storage
security.py has sanitize_input() function but it's not being used in drafts.py save_draft endpoint
Recommendation: Add sanitization middleware or apply sanitize_input() to all user-provided text fields in DraftSave model

success_rate.backend: 92% (23/25 tests passed - 2 XSS security tests failed)

test_credentials.test_user: test@visionary-suite.com / Test@2026# (13 credits, rank #6 in battle)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Layer 3 Negative/Failure Suite complete. CRITICAL: 2 XSS vulnerabilities found in /api/drafts/save - title and story_text fields accept and store raw XSS payloads without sanitization. All other security tests passed: NoSQL injection blocked, invalid/malformed tokens return 401, protected endpoints require auth, rate limiting configured. Abuse tests passed: one-active-draft-per-user model works, no credit manipulation possible, user draft isolation verified. Edge cases handled: empty body, null values, special characters (emoji/unicode), invalid params, malformed JSON all handled gracefully. Idempotency tests passed: double status transitions, discard non-existent draft, concurrent dashboard init all work correctly. Frontend negative tests passed: non-existent pages don't crash, standard user redirected from admin, rapid navigation works.

SEC-NEG-1.details: XSS payload '<script>alert(1)</script>' stored without sanitization in draft title

SEC-NEG-2.details: XSS payload '' stored without sanitization in story_text

SEC-NEG-3.details: Oversized payload (10000 chars) handled gracefully - accepted and stored

SEC-NEG-8.details: Rate limiting configured (100/minute for login, account lockout after failures)

ABUSE-NEG-1.details: Rapid fire draft saves - no duplicates created (one active draft per user)

ABUSE-NEG-2.details: No unauthorized credit manipulation possible - all manipulation endpoints return 404/405

ABUSE-NEG-3.details: User draft isolation verified - admin cannot see test user's draft

EDGE-NEG-1.details: Empty body on draft save handled gracefully (200)

EDGE-NEG-2.details: Null values in draft handled gracefully (200)

EDGE-NEG-3.details: Special characters (emoji, unicode, newlines) stored and retrieved correctly

EDGE-NEG-4.details: Invalid vibe parameter falls back to random (200)

EDGE-NEG-7.details: Very long email (1000 chars) handled gracefully (400)

IDEM-NEG-1.details: Double status transition handled without corruption

IDEM-NEG-3.details: 5 concurrent dashboard init requests return consistent responses

FRONTEND-NEG-1.details: Non-existent story battle page shows content (no white screen crash)

FRONTEND-NEG-2.details: Non-existent story viewer page shows content (no crash)

FRONTEND-NEG-4.details: Rapid navigation between pages completed without crashes

xss_vulnerability.description: User-provided content is stored without XSS sanitization. Raw script tags and event handlers are stored and returned on retrieval.
reproduction_steps: 4. Observe raw script tags in response
xss_vulnerability.recommended_fix: Apply security.sanitize_input() to title and story_text fields in save_draft endpoint before storage
